subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! It is recorded in the glorious Gospel that one day a company of Jews came into the holy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی در انجیل جلیل مذکور که روزی جمعی از یهودیان بساحت قدس حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @stories; anecdotes, @obedience to and respect for government authority
